#  Delete Owner Invoices 
#####  In Beta
This page details the modernized owner invoice experience.
##  Background 
You can only delete an invoice if it's in the _Draft_ , _Under Review_ , or _Revise_ and _Resubmit_ status; approved invoices cannot be deleted. Additionally, you can only delete the latest invoice on the contract.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the Prime Contracts tool.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * You can also delete invoices using the Invoicing tool. See [Delete Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/delete-an-owner-invoice).


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-owner-invoices)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Prime Contracts** tool.
  2. Locate the contract with the invoice to delete. Click the **Number** link to open the contract.
  3. In the contract, click the **Invoices** tab.
  4. In the **Invoices (Payment Applications)** table, locate the invoice to delete. 
#####  Tip
**Did you know you can also navigate to owner invoices using the Invoicing tool?** To learn how, see [Delete Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/delete-an-owner-invoice).
  5. Click the **Invoice #** link to open the invoice.
  6. In the invoice, click the ![Invoice Overflow Icon](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c4d2e4cbca7d1ec5e2456bc9b95aef41/47f70d63130732c88d0f964e64ae696a/invoice-overflow-icon.png?fm=webp&h=20) **Overflow** icon and choose the **Delete** option.


## See Also
  * [Create Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-owner-invoices)
  * [Edit Prime Contracts (Beta)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/edit-prime-contracts)
  * [Complete Owner Invoices with DocuSign®](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/complete-owner-invoices-with-docusign)
title: Delete Owner Invoices
description: How to delete an owner invoice using navigation from the Prime Contracts tool.
